message:
feat(hook): integrate suggestions into deny/warn output (git_safety_guard-1gt.5.4)

Pass pattern name to output_denial and output_warning so they can:
- Display stable rule_id (pack:pattern) for allowlisting
- Look up suggestions from registry
- Show copy/paste learning commands (dcg explain, dcg allowlist add)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
